examples.title: Default settings (4 chains × 1000 draws, then finalize)
examples.description: Standard fit followed by automatic finalization. The CSV must be sorted by (resp_id, task_id, alt_id).

examples.title: Tighter prior with finalize in one call
examples.description: Use η = 2.0 to shrink correlations toward zero, then immediately finalize to get diagnostics and part_worths.csv.
